nodes.label: pytest configuration for career-datacenter test suite.  Adds cli/ to sys.path so
Pipeline Integration Tests  End-to-end tests simulating the full scrape → filter
Tests skills_gap.py functions without touching the filesystem for jobs.
Tests for cli/answer_bank.py (AnswerBank)  No Playwright required — only YAML +
Write minimal YAML to a temp file and return its path.
Return an AnswerBank loaded from the temp YAML.
Bank should contain 5 entries from the minimal fixture.
Missing YAML file → empty bank, no crash.
Every flattened entry must have key, category, answer, type, aliases.
_flatten produces the correct number of entries.
Exact alias substring → correct entry returned.
Match should work regardless of casing.
Alias is a substring of a longer question label.
Slightly misspelled question should still fuzzy-match.
Threshold of 1.0 should never match unless exact.
The 'type' field should be preserved faithfully.
Unit tests for JobTracker — save, deduplicate, update status, reports.
Unit tests for JobDeduplicator — persistence, expiry, filtering.
Tests for cli/easy_apply_filler.py (EasyApplyFiller)  All Playwright calls are m
Return EasyApplyFiller with a mocked _page injected.
headless must default to False so user sees browser.
Profile YAML should be parsed into _profile dict.
navigate_to_job() should call page.goto() with the correct URL.
click_easy_apply_button() returns True when a visible button exists.
click_easy_apply_button() returns False when no button is visible.
is_on_review_page() returns True when Submit button found.
is_on_review_page() returns False when no review signals exist.
fill_contact_info() should complete without raising even with mock page.
fill_contact_info() should not call fill() if profile values are empty.
upload_resume() warns if resume file does not exist.
upload_resume() calls set_input_files() when file input exists.
_click_next_button() returns True when a visible, enabled button exists.
_click_next_button() returns False when no button matches.
Overnight batch processor for LinkedIn jobs.
Return only jobs that were approved in the review CLI.
Send daily email digest if Gmail credentials are configured.
